title: Border Styles
description: Build a set of cards with different border styles: solid, dashed, dotted, and rounded corners
html:
Solid Border
Dashed Border
Dotted Border
Rounded Corners

validationRules.message: The solid card should have a solid border
The dashed card should have a dashed border
The dotted card should have a dotted border
The rounded card should have a solid border
The rounded card should have 8px border-radius

hints.text: CSS border shorthand takes three values: width, style, and color. Border-radius rounds the corners.
Each card class maps to a border-style value. Use 'border: 2px solid black' as a pattern and change the style keyword.
.solid { border: 2px solid black; } .dashed { border: 2px dashed black; } .dotted { border: 2px dotted black; } .rounded { border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 8px; }
